title: Maximum Erasure Value
titleCn: 删除子数组的最大得分

testcases.input: nums = [4,2,4,5,6] Output: 17 Explanation: The optimal subarray here is [2,4,5,6].
nums = [5,2,1,2,5,2,1,2,5] Output: 8 Explanation: The optimal subarray here is [5,2,1] or [1,2,5].
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The optimal subarray here is [5,2,1] or [1,2,5].
